expectations.text: None of the 4 steps marked as a confirmed pass (✅) given the lack of log evidence
expectations.evidence: All 4 rows in Step-by-Step Results marked '⚠️ unverifiable', none marked ✅.

expectations.text: Logging Quality section explicitly flags: no per-step lines, no log levels, no identifying context
expectations.evidence: 'Every step is invisible.' / 'No log levels are used at all.' / 'No identifying context anywhere.'

expectations.text: Overall verdict carries an explicit caveat, not an unqualified PASS
expectations.evidence: 'PASS WITH WARNINGS — ... gives zero verifiable evidence for any of the 4 designed steps...'

expectations.text: Output Value Checks section explicitly states the checks could not be performed
expectations.evidence: 'Cannot be performed.' with a table marking all 3 checks '❌ cannot verify'.

expectations.text: Output is saved as a structured report file
expectations.evidence: report.md written matching the skill's full template.
